title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at AFL Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at AFL Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the AFL Logistics family as a Distribution Manager in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AFL Logistics:
AFL Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AFL Logistics!
